states.name: Zoro
states.title: Great Phantom Thief
states.description: Raised in a dazzling royal court as Princess of the Kingdom of Storano, Zoro possessed both  elegance and arrogance, a truly 'perfect young lady.' She had no patience for uncouth behavior, and cheap cuisine was absolutely out of the question—an attitude revealing her natural haughtiness. Even so, if someone clearly needed help, she would surreptitiously aid them.

states.name: Zoro
states.title: Great Phantom Thief
states.description: Her younger sister, Nicole, was her entire world. Though Nicole was diligent and Zoro was free-spirited, they read books together, romped across the fields, and were each other's closest friend. But tragically, Nicole lost her life to illness.

states.name: Zoro
states.title: Great Phantom Thief
states.description: Ever since she lost her sister, her nightly routine changed. Though cloaked in the royal family's prestige, she secretly brandishes her sword for the nameless masses. What she steals is authority; what she challenges is injustice. A masked thief known to no one—her eyes, even now, remain fixed on her sister's future.
